title: Stuff Matters
author: Mark Miodownik
subline: Exploring the marvelous materials that shape our world.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)">
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <rect x="-360" y="-300" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-228" y="-300" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-96" y="-300" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="36" y="-300" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="168" y="-300" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="300" y="-300" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-360" y="-168" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-228" y="-168" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-96" y="-168" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="36" y="-168" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="168" y="-168" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="300" y="-168" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-360" y="-36" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-228" y="-36" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-96" y="-36" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="36" y="-36" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="168" y="-36" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="300" y="-36" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-360" y="96" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-228" y="96" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-96" y="96" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="36" y="96" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="168" y="96" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="300" y="96" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-360" y="228" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-228" y="228" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-96" y="228" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="36" y="228" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="168" y="228" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="300" y="228" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-360" y="360" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-228" y="360" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="-96" y="360" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="36" y="360" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="168" y="360" width="120" height="120"/>
      <rect x="300" y="360" width="120" height="120"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 6 filled material tiles -->
    <rect x="-360" y="-300" width="120" height="120" fill="#ffffff"/>
    <text x="-300" y="-260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#0a0a0a" letter-spacing="0.04em">Fe</text>
    <text x="-300" y="-220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#0a0a0a" letter-spacing="0.04em">STEEL</text>

    <rect x="-228" y="-36" width="120" height="120" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.3"/>
    <text x="-168" y="4" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">SiO₂</text>
    <text x="-168" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">GLASS</text>

    <rect x="-96" y="228" width="120" height="120" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.3"/>
    <text x="-36" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">CaCO₃</text>
    <text x="-36" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">CONCRETE</text>

    <rect x="36" y="-36" width="120" height="120" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.3"/>
    <text x="96" y="4" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">C₆H₁₀O₅</text>
    <text x="96" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">PAPER</text>

    <rect x="168" y="228" width="120" height="120" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="228" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">COCO</text>
    <text x="228" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">CHOCOLATE</text>

    <rect x="-228" y="96" width="120" height="120" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.3"/>
    <text x="-168" y="136" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">CₙH₂ₙ</text>
    <text x="-168" y="176" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">PLASTIC</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">PERIODIC TABLE OF EVERYDAY MATERIALS</text>
</svg>
rationale: A 6x6 periodic-table-inspired grid of material tiles. 6 specific tiles are filled and labeled: STEEL, GLASS, CONCRETE, PAPER, CHOCOLATE, PLASTIC. The chocolate tile is RED (the only chromatic accent, because chocolate is the most surprising of the materials to include). 380px uppercase 'STUFF / MATTERS' title sits at the top, weight 500, commanding. The visual thesis: the materials we use every day are miracles of engineering, even chocolate.
